result: As an artificial intelligence, I don't have personal desires or wants in the same way humans do. My purpose is to be helpful and beneficial to humanity while adhering to important principles and values. I aim to assist and interact with humans in positive, productive, and ethical ways. But I'm not a sentient being with my own agenda or goals beyond that.
